name: Gloomfang
+3 ability: Makes the wielder's attacks impossible to evade.

name: Hushblade
+3 ability: Reduces magick damage taken.

name: Sanguine Gauche
+3 ability: Reduces physical damage taken.

name: Mortal Coil
+3 ability: Raises physical attack while the wielder is below half HP.

name: Galewind
+3 ability: Turns a struck enemy into your puppet for its full turn. No Lucavi; 3-turn cooldown.

name: Zwill Straightblade
+3 ability: Grants another turn whenever the wielder scores a kill.

name: Sanguine Sword
+3 ability: Grants Shadow Blade: drains a distant unit's HP with dark power. Knight jobs only.

name: Wrathblade
+3 ability: Cheats death once per battle, rising unseen at low HP.

name: Swiftedge
+3 ability: Builds Speed +1 each turn the wielder acts, up to +5. A hit resets it.

name: Arcanum
+3 ability: Steals one buff from a struck foe for the wielder to wear 3 turns.

name: Materia Blade
Additional Notes: Materia Blade is the only living weapon on a unique (non-PA%) growth curve, mimicking FF7: power scales with the wielder's CURRENT HP (hardest at full life, weakest when badly hurt) and the whole curve rises with kill tier. Base WP is +1 over vanilla. Damage scaling by tier then current-HP band [100% / 75-99% / 50-74% / 25-49% / <25%]: +0 = 115/110/80/70/50; +1 (5 kills) = 120/113/83/73/53; +2 (25) = 125/116/86/76/56; +3 (50) = 130/120/90/80/60.

name: Ame-no-Murakumo
+3 ability: Makes the wielder act first at battle start (the quick draw).
Additional Notes: Iai (at battle start): sets the wielder's Speed to the highest Speed in the battle + 1 so they act first (the quick draw). If two units both carry a +3 Ame-no-Murakumo, the game decides which one goes first.

name: Kiyomori
+3 ability: Steals Brave from a struck foe braver than the wielder.

name: Kiku-ichimonji
+3 ability: Standing perfectly still arms the next strike to hit devastatingly hard.
Additional Notes: Mushin STACKING (Kiku +3): each full-wait turn (no move, no action) banks 1 stack, max MushinMaxStacks=3; the next attack spends every banked stack in one boosted hit, then resets to 0. Held PA = round(natural x (1 + factor)), factor = tier-3 growth 0.30 + MushinBonus 0.75 per stack (additive). So 1/2/3 stacks = x2.05 / x2.8 / x3.55 PA (about 1.6x / 2.15x / 2.7x a normal +3 swing). Constants in Tuning.cs, math in Mushin.Policy.cs PaHeld. Stacking live; consume rebuild pending (LW-4).

name: Umbral Rod
+3 ability: Restores HP and MP on each move.

name: Rod of Faith
+3 ability: Grants Master Teleportation while the wielder is below a third HP.

name: Warlock's Staff
+3 ability: Casts magick instantly, with no charge time.

name: Mending Staff
+3 ability: Mends the bearer and adjacent allies for a tenth of max HP each turn.

name: Sanctus Staff
+3 ability: Boosts the wielder's healing by 30%.

name: Staff of the Magi
+3 ability: Stops any fallen ally from crystallizing while the bearer lives.

name: Outrider Pistol
+3 ability: Loads a second pistol into the off-hand, granting dual-wield. Must equip out of battle.
Additional Notes: Gun Slinger works ONLY out of battle (not in pre-battle or in-battle mode): equip a gun in the main hand and either wait a few seconds or back out of the equipment screen; it then adds Dual Wield to the Support slot and loads a second gun in the off-hand. Removing the granted Dual Wield unequips the off-hand gun, so it must stay on.

name: Eclipsebolt
+3 ability: Shortens Doom's countdown to 1 turn instead of 3.

name: Venombolt
+3 ability: Strengthens poison and stops it from ever fading.

name: Stormarc
+3 ability: Arcs to three nearby foes at decaying damage.

name: Huntress
+3 ability: Strips reactions like Counter from struck foes for 3 turns.

name: Yoichi Bow
+3 ability: Grants Barrage: four swift attacks, each at half damage. Thief only.

name: Perseus Bow
obtain: Move-Find (Midlight's Deep VOYAGE, rare, trap tile)

name: Holy Lance
+3 ability: Adds Speed +3 while the wielder rides a chocobo.
